title: GetResponse and ChangesResponse use String for IDs bypassing Id invariant
description: methods.rs GetResponse::account_id, QueryResponse::ids, ChangesResponse::created/updated/destroyed all use String or Vec<String> rather than Id. This bypasses the non-empty validation enforced by Id's Deserialize impl. A server returning an empty string in any of these fields will produce an empty-string ID that passes silently through the type system and causes downstream failures (e.g. an empty chat_id in a message_query filter). The maintenance consequence is: contributors adding new method wrappers will copy this pattern, since it matches the existing response types, and the non-empty invariant will be absent from all new ID fields in response types.
